mean_cn: n.上层集团，掌权人物，精英；  adj.精英的，精锐的
mean_en: a small group of people in a society, etc. who are powerful and have a lot of influence, because they are rich, intelligent, etc.
sentence: Only a few elites can make it to the top of the pyramid.
sentence_trans: 只有少数精英能到达金字塔顶端。
word_etyma: e出 + lite选择，收集 → 选出的人物 → elite精英人物
